description: Add hexagonal harvest reward markers on the map showing each province's harvest rewards, connected to their RegionCard with colored lines.
steps: 1. Define HARVEST_REWARDS constant in GameBoard.tsx with reward data, colors, and positions for all 8 provinces
2. Add connecting lines in the SVG overlay from harvest hexagon positions to province RegionCard positions
3. Add harvest hexagon elements in the regions-overlay div, positioned absolutely
4. Add .harvest-hex CSS class in App.css with hexagonal clip-path, semi-transparent background, and icon styling
acceptance_criteria: Running npx tsc -b produces no type errors
Each province has a hexagonal marker showing its harvest reward icons
Each hexagon is positioned at the specified coordinates on the map
Each hexagon has a colored line connecting it to its RegionCard
The hexagons use clip-path for hexagonal shape with province-specific colors
